untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (broadening wedge with descending trend lines) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). Detecting trend line slopes and broadening wedge formations requires geometric analysis or pattern-detection indicators not in the allowed set.
translation_notes: The core entry condition 'Short sale positioned at the top of the formation' and the pattern structure (descending broadening wedge) cannot be operationalized without trend line detection or pattern recognition capabilities. The exit condition references 'Formation height projected upward' which also requires pattern geometry. The 0.15 stop loss has been set as the stop_loss_pct value. A basic placeholder condition (price crossing below previous high for entry, crossing above previous close for exit) was provided, but this does not capture the intended pattern logic.
